---
description: "Use when building React or Next.js components, routes, data-fetching logic, and UI interactions."
applyTo: "**/*.{tsx,jsx}"
---
# React and Next Guidelines

- Keep components focused and reusable.
- Prefer accessible markup and keyboard-friendly interactions.
- Separate data-fetching logic from presentation when practical.
- Handle loading, empty, and error states explicitly.
- Add tests for key user flows and state transitions.
